tasks.title: Implement Discord webhook notifier
tasks.description: New internal/notifier package with SendDiscord(webhookURL, name, message). Wire into contact.go on StateCompleted. URL from DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL env.

tasks.title: Tests for contact form and submission handler
tasks.description: Unit tests for huh form state transitions and notifier package. Target 80%+ coverage on new code.

tasks.title: Pre-deploy configuration review
tasks.description: Verify Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, data volume mounts. Check make docker-up works end to end.
